name: notification_channel_join

text.description: Message text to send when joining

name: datadog_monitors_search
description: Get Datadog monitor details in trigger state

query.description: Custom query string to filter monitors

limit.description: Number of results per page (default: 30, max: 100)

duration.description: Duration in hours to look back for triggered monitors

name: notification_channel_message
description: Send message to communication channels (Slack, Teams, Google Chat) for incident management

platform.description: Communication platform to send message to

channel_id.description: Channel ID to send message to

team_id.description: Team/Workspace ID (If not specified, team id from tool integration will be used)

name: resource_events_enricher
description: Enriches alert with additional nearby kubernetes events

max_pods.description: Maximum number of pods to capture events

dependent_pod_mode.display_name: When True, instead of fetching events for the deployment itself, fetch events for pods in the deployment

name: related_pods
description: Enriches alert with related pods

name: logs_enricher
description: Enriches pod alert with logs

name: pod_events_enricher
description: Enriches alert with pod events

max_events.description: Maximum number of events to capture

included_types.description: list of event types to include

name: deployment_events_enricher
description: Enriches alert with deployment events

dependent_pod_mode.display_name: When True, instead of fetching events for the deployment itself, fetch events for pods in the deployment

max_pods.description: Maximum number of pods to capture events

description: Enriches alert with job events

max_events.description: Maximum number of events to capture

included_types.description: Comma list of event types to include

name: job_pod_enricher
description: Enriches alert with job pods

name: get_resource_yaml
description: Enriches alert with resource yaml

name: node_cpu_enricher
description: Enrich the finding with analysis of the node's CPU usage. Collect information about pods running on this node, their CPU request configuration, their actual cpu usage etc.Provides insightful information regarding node high CPU usage.

name: node_disk_analyzer
description: Provides relevant disk information for troubleshooting disk issues. Currently, the following information is provided by default , The total disk space used by pods, and the total disk space used by the node for other purposes, Disk usage of pods, sorted from highest to lowest

name: node_running_pods_enricher
description: Enrich the finding with pods running on this node, along with the 'Ready' status of each pod.

name: node_allocatable_resources_enricher
description: Enrich the finding with the allocatable resources of the node.

name: node_status_enricher
description: Enrich the finding with the status of the node.

name: report_crash_loop
description: Report the pods that are in crash loop

name: pod_enricher
description: Enriches alert with pod information

name: cpu_overcommited_enricher
description: Enrich the finding with analysis of the CPU overcommitment on the node. Provides insightful information regarding node high CPU usage.

name: memory_overcommited_enricher
description: Enrich the finding with analysis of the memory overcommitment on the node. Provides insightful information regarding node high memory usage.

name: cluster_memory_requests_enricher
description: Enrich the finding with the memory requests of the cluster.

name: pod_issue_investigator
description: Investigate the issue with the pod

name: custom_image_run_enricher
description: Run script using custom image

image.description: Custom image to run the script

secret.description: Secret to use for the custom image

config_map.description: Config map to use for the custom image

env_variables.description: Environment variables to use for the custom image

args.description: Arguments to pass to the custom image

service_account.description: Service account to use for the custom image

command.description: Command to run in the custom image

name: kubectl_command_executor
description: Execute kubectl command

name: pod_bash_enricher
description: Run bash command in the pod

name: pg_health_enricher
description: Check PostgreSQL health using predefined queries

secret_name.description: The name of the Kubernetes secret containing database credentials.

secret_namespace.description: The Kubernetes namespace where the secret is located.

name: pg_run_queries
description: Execute user-defined PostgreSQL queries

secret_name.description: The name of the Kubernetes secret containing database credentials.

secret_namespace.description: The Kubernetes namespace where the secret is located.

queries.description: A list of SQL queries to execute against the PostgreSQL database.

name: node_semantic_version_mismatch_enricher
description: Detects and reports if there is a mismatch in the semantic versions of nodes in the cluster.

name: prometheus_pvc_event_enricher
description: Enriches alert with relevant PersistentVolumeClaim (PVC) events from Prometheus.

name: status_enricher
description: Enriches the alert with resource status conditions, optionally showing detailed messages.

show_details.description: Shows the message attached to each condition

name: cluster_cpu_requests_enricher
description: Enriches alert with cluster CPU requests over a specific duration.

name: impacted_services_enricher
description: Identifies services impacted by a pod event, considering a delay before analysis.

delay_s.description: The amount of seconds to delay before analyzing impacted services

name: daemonset_status_enricher
description: Enriches the alert with the status of the DaemonSet, including pod distribution and health.

name: target_down_dns_silencer
description: Silences DNS-related target down alerts.

name: daemonset_misscheduled_analysis_enricher
description: Analyzes misscheduled DaemonSets and provides insights.

name: node_pods_capacity_enricher
description: Provides analysis of node pod capacity and scheduling constraints.

name: alert_explanation_enricher
description: Provides human-readable explanations and suggested resolutions for Prometheus alerts.

alert_explanation.description: A human-readable explanation of when Prometheus fires the alert

recommended_resolution.description: A recommended resolution for the alert

name: oom_killer_enricher
description: Analyzes OOMKills and provides memory metrics for root cause analysis.

new_oom_kills_duration_in_sec.description: Only report OOMKills that occurred in the last X seconds.

metrics_duration_in_secs.description: Time duration for memory usage metrics to analyze OOMKill reasons.

description: Generates resource usage graphs for Prometheus alerts.

description: Generates resource usage graphs for Prometheus alerts.

description: Generates resource usage graphs for Prometheus alerts.

item_type.description: Type of resource for which the graph will be generated (Pod, Node).

name: statefulset_replicas_enricher
description: Enriches alerts with information about StatefulSet replicas.

name: job_info_enricher
description: Provides detailed job execution information.

name: cpu_throttling_analysis_enricher
description: Analyzes CPU throttling events in pods.

description: Generates pod-level resource usage graphs with optional limits.

display_limits.description: Displays pod limits for Memory on the graph if true.

name: pod_metric_enricher_cpu
description: Generates pod-level resource usage graphs with optional limits.

display_limits.description: Displays pod limits for CPU on the graph if true.

description: Generates pod-level resource usage graphs with optional limits.

name: hpa_mismatch_enricher

check_for_metrics_server.description: Checks if metrics-server is available and suggests how to add it.

name: api_failure_enricher
description: Detects API failures and provides related insights.

name: api_traces_enricher
description: Provides detailed traces of API requests.

duration.description: Duration of the trace in minutes.

name: prometheus_enricher
description: Executes Prometheus Queries.

promql_query.description: Single Prometheus Query to execute. Use this OR promql_queries for multiple queries.

promql_queries.description: Multiple named Prometheus queries to execute. Each query has a key (name) and query (PromQL expression).

duration_minutes.description: Duration in minutes for the query execution.

description: Run script in the pod

command.description: Command to run in the pod

image.description: Image name to be used to run the command

secret.description: Secret required used to run the command

use_side_car.description: Run the command as side car container

pod_name.description: Pod name to run the command

namespace.description: Namespace in which pod is running

description: Profile the pod

duration.description: Duration of the profile in seconds

description: Get Kubernetes Deployment

namespace.description: Namespace in which Deployment is running

description: Get Kubernetes pod

namespace.description: Namespace in which resource is running

name: text_enricher
description: Enriches the alert with a text message.

text.description: Text to enrich the alert with.

name: resource_logs_enricher
description: Enriches the alert with logs from a specific pod.

pod_name.description: Name of the pod to fetch logs from.

namespace.description: Namespace in which the pod is running.

container_name.description: Name of the container to fetch logs from.

since_seconds.description: Fetch logs since this many seconds ago.

tail_lines.description: Number of lines to fetch from the end of the logs.

name: nubi_enricher
description: Trigger LLM based investigation

name: chronosphere_traces_enricher
description: Query Chronosphere Traces

start_time.description: Start time for trace query (RFC3339 format). Defaults to event start time if available.

end_time.description: End time for trace query (RFC3339 format). Defaults to event end time if available.

service.description: Service to filter on. An empty value doesn't apply any service filter.

trace_ids.description: Trace IDs to search for. Comma separated list of trace IDs.

tag_filters.description: Tag filter to apply. An empty value doesn't apply any tag filter.

key.description: The key (or name) of the span tag that is inspected by this filter.

numeric_value.description: Matcher used to evaluate the span tag value as a numeric value (if the tag with the given key is found and the value type is numerical).

comparison.description: The comparison operation to be applied to an input against the given filter value.

value.description: The filter value used in comparison against match candidates.
Matcher used to evaluate the span tag value (if the tag with the given key is found and the value type is a string).

in_values.description: Values the filter tests against when using IN or NOT_IN match type.

match.description: If EXACT, compared strings have the exact value of the filter value.

value.description: The value the filter compares to the target trace or span field.

name: signoz_logs_enricher
description: Query Signoz Logs with optional regex label extraction

duration.description: Duration in minutes for which Signoz logs should be collected and analyzed.

regex_extractors.description: Array of regex patterns to extract labels from log entries. Each extractor should have 'pattern' (regex with capture groups) and 'label_name' fields.

pattern.description: Regex pattern with capture groups to extract values from log body

label_name.description: Name of the label to store extracted value

name: traces_dependency_map
description: Generates a service dependency map from traces for a specified service over a defined time range or duration.

service_name.description: Name of the service for which the dependency map is to be generated.

duration.description: Duration for trace data collection (e.g., '30m', '1h', '2h30m'). Takes priority over start_time/end_time.

start_time.description: Start time for the dependency map data range (RFC3339 format). Used only if duration is not specified.

end_time.description: End time for the dependency map data range (RFC3339 format). Used only if duration is not specified.

label_filter.description: Label filters to apply to trace queries. Each filter has key, value, and operator fields.

exclude_filters.description: Filters to exclude external services matching these criteria. Same structure as label_filter.

upstream_only.description: If true, only show upstream services (callers) of the target service.

name: cloud_resource
description: Lookup Resources for Cloud Provider Like AWS/GCP/Azure

service_name.description: Cloud Provider Service Name (e.g., EC2, RDS, Lambda)

resource_ids.description: List of Resource IDs to check

instance_ids.description: List of Instance IDs to check

account_id.description: Optional AccountId to use for Cloud Account

name: cloud_list_metrics
description: Lookup Metrics for Cloud Provider Resources

service_name.description: Cloud Provider Service Name (e.g., EC2, RDS, Lambda)

metric_names.description: List of Metric Names to query

resource_id.description: Resource ID / ARN to filter metrics

resource_ids.description: List of Resource IDs to filter metrics

statistic.description: Statistic to retrieve (e.g., Average, Sum, Maximum, Minimum)

start_time.description: Start time (RFC3339 format). Defaults to event start time.

end_time.description: End time (RFC3339 format). Defaults to event end time.

account_id.description: Optional AccountId to use for Cloud Account

name: cloud_logs
description: Lookup Logs for Cloud Provider Resources

resource_id.description: Resource name to check for logs

log_group_name.description: Log Group name for the query

start_time.description: Start time for the dependency map data range (RFC3339 format). Used only if duration is not specified.

end_time.description: End time for the dependency map data range (RFC3339 format). Used only if duration is not specified.

account_id.description: Optional AccountId to use for Cloud Account

name: cloud_service_map
display_name: Get Service Map For Cloud Resources
description: Lookup Service Map Cloud Provider Resources

resource_id.description: Resource name to check for service map

account_id.description: Optional AccountId to use for Cloud Account

name: ssh
description: Execute a CLI command Using SSH

integration_name.description: Integration to use for SSH Details

user_name.description: SSH username to use for connection. Overrides the integration default.

account_id.description: Optional AccountId to use for SSH Command

name: traces
description: Queries traces of API requests based on configured account

query_options.description: Additional parameters specific to provider for Querying Traces.

duration.description: Duration in minutes for which Query should be executed.

account_id.description: Optional AccountId to use for Traces

name: logs
description: Queries logs based on configured account

duration.description: Duration in minutes for which logs should be collected and analyzed.

query_options.description: Additional parameters specific to provider for Querying Logs.

regex_extractors.description: Array of regex patterns to extract labels from log entries. Each extractor should have 'pattern' (regex with capture groups) and 'label_name' fields.

pattern.description: Regex pattern with capture groups to extract values from log body

label_name.description: Name of the label to store extracted value

label_extractors.description: Array of label extractors to extract values from log attributes. Each extractor maps a log attribute to a label.

label_name.description: Name of the label to store extracted value

placeholder_name.description: Optional placeholder name. If not provided, label_name is used.

account_id.description: Optional AccountId to use for Logs

name: metrics
description: Queries metrics based on configured account

duration.description: Duration in minutes for which metrics should be collected and analyzed.

query_options.description: Additional parameters specific to provider for Querying Metrices.

account_id.description: Optional AccountId to use for Metrics

name: proxy_db_query
description: Execute a SQL query against a database connected via the proxy agent (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MSSQL, ClickHouse, Oracle)

datasource_id.description: Integration ID of the database datasource

database.description: Database name to query (overrides datasource default)

max_rows.description: Maximum number of rows to return

name: proxy_http_request
description: Make an HTTP request to an internal API connected via the proxy agent (Grafana, Jenkins, health endpoints)

datasource_id.description: Integration ID of the HTTP datasource

url.description: URL path to request (relative to datasource base URL)

headers.description: Additional HTTP headers as key-value pairs

name: proxy_ssh_command
description: Execute a command on a remote server via SSH through the proxy agent

datasource_id.description: Integration ID of the SSH datasource

command.description: Shell command to execute on the remote server

name: metric_anomaly_enricher
description: Detects anomalies in metrics by comparing current values against historical baselines using statistical analysis.

namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace of the workload to analyze.

deployment.description: Name of the deployment/workload to analyze.

query.description: PromQL query to fetch the metric for anomaly detection.

analysis_start_time.description: Start time of the analysis window (RFC3339 format). Defaults to event start time.

analysis_end_time.description: End time of the analysis window (RFC3339 format). Defaults to event end time.

historical_window_hours.description: Number of hours of historical data to use as baseline (default: 168 = 7 days).

name: cloud_cli
description: Execute an AWS, GCP, or Azure CLI command on a cloud account

account_id.description: Cloud account to execute the command on

command.description: CLI command to execute (e.g., aws ec2 describe-instances, gcloud compute instances list, az vm list)
